mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.name, COUNT(*) AS todayTotal FROM agency a LEFT JOIN found_item fi ON a.id = fi.agency_id WHERE fi.created_at >= CURDATE() GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY todayTotal DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT prdt_cl_nm AS category, COUNT(*) AS todayTotal FROM found_item WHERE created_at >= CURDATE() GROUP BY prdt_cl_nm ORDER BY todayTotal DESC LIMIT 5
